name: 10X Genomics + CITE-seq Protocol

usage.en: Single-cell preparation from solid tumor with Percoll gradient purification, CITE-seq antibody staining with hashing (HTO), and 10X Chromium loading.
usage.zh: 从实体瘤制备单细胞悬液，Percoll 密度梯度纯化，CITE-seq 抗体染色（含 hashing），10X Chromium 上样。

materials.name: 1× HBSS without Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺ (with and without Phenol Red)
CITE-seq staining buffer, Wash Buffers A/B/C

components.name: Step 1 (Dissociation): Prepare dissociation medium per Miltenyi kit. Mince 0.04-1 g tumor with razor. Transfer to tube, rotate 37°C 1 h.
Step 2: Centrifuge 400 g 4°C 5 min. Aspirate, add 10 mL cold PBS, filter through 40-70 µm strainer.
Step 3 (Percoll gradient): Resuspend pellet in 4 mL 70% Percoll. Layer 4 mL 37% Red Percoll on top. Layer 4 mL 30% Percoll on top.

note.en: Prepare Percoll day-of-use only. Keep at RT (22-25°C).
note.zh: Percoll 仅当天配制。保持室温 (22-25°C)。

components.name: Step 4: Centrifuge swinging bucket 800 g, 25 min, RT, LOWEST acceleration, NO BRAKE.

note.en: CRITICAL: Low acceleration and no brake prevent gradient disruption.
note.zh: 关键：低加速和无制动防止梯度破坏。

components.name: Step 5: Remove layers above buffy coat at 37%/70% interface (slowly, tip at surface). Extract buffy coat with wide-bore tip into new 15 mL tube.
Step 6: Wash to 15 mL with cold PBS. Centrifuge 400 g 7 min 4°C. Resuspend in staining buffer.
Step 7 (Fc block): Resuspend 0.5M cells in 50 µL FcR block (1:5 in staining buffer). Incubate 20 min on ice.
Step 8 (CITE-seq staining): Add 50 µL antibody cocktail (0.125 µg each CITE-seq Ab + unique HTO antibody per sample). Incubate 25 min on ice.

note.en: CRITICAL: Each sample must receive a UNIQUE HTO antibody for hashing.
note.zh: 关键：每个样本必须使用唯一的 HTO 抗体。

components.name: Step 9 (Washes): Wash with ≥5 mL staining buffer (350-400 g 5 min 4°C) → Wash A → Wash B → Wash C. Count cells during final wash.
Step 10: Resuspend at 1,600 cells/µL in staining buffer for 10X superloading.

notes.en: Percoll preparation: Working stock (WS) = 6.42 mL Percoll + 0.71 mL 10× HBSS. 70% = 3.5 mL WS + 1 mL 1× HBSS. 37% Red = 1.85 mL WS + 2.65 mL red HBSS. 30% = 1.5 mL WS + 3 mL 1× HBSS. Red HBSS enhances buffy coat visibility. Centrifuge Percoll within 10 min of layering. Minimize Percoll carryover when extracting buffy coat. Titrate antibodies by flow cytometry before CITE-seq.
notes.zh: Percoll 配制：工作液 (WS) = 6.42 mL Percoll + 0.71 mL 10× HBSS。70% = 3.5 mL WS + 1 mL 1× HBSS。37% 红 = 1.85 mL WS + 2.65 mL 含酚红 HBSS。30% = 1.5 mL WS + 3 mL 1× HBSS。分层后 10 分钟内离心。取 buffy coat 时减少 Percoll 带出。

ref: Adapted from 10X Genomics + CITE-seq protocol; BioLegend TotalSeq guidelines
